pattern: Assigning every position a signed force from the nearest pushes on each side, then taking the sign of the net force, resolves the whole row in one linear pass.
hints: Each standing domino is decided by the tug-of-war between the nearest push on its left and the nearest push on its right.
Sweep left to right accumulating a rightward force that decays with distance, then sweep right to left for the leftward force.
For every index combine the two forces; a positive net falls right, a negative net falls left, and a tie leaves it standing.

edge_inputs.description: adjacent rights then a left, no spread
opposing forces meet on an odd gap, center stays
opposing forces meet on an even gap
a right push falls all the way
a left push falls all the way

stress.description: random rows of L, R, and dots of varied length
stress.note: dot-heavy alphabet leaves long gaps where forces compete
